- Pls understand some awkward points on docs: I'm just a Brainless Korean Hischooler

## 1. Overview

### How This Was Born

- On 2025, from Highschool R&E Program
- Script for CFD research
- Spaghetti, Logic Twist, Total Chaos and Great Mess
- [Learn More about the CHAOTIC Proto-type](https://github.com/s2510423/2025-2-CFD)

### Why This Was Needed

- Need for Repeatable, Automatic Parameter Sweep on OpenFOAM
- i was so tired on making new hard-coded script repeatedly
- **Problem**: Manual, Non-Reusability, Overfitted on one research topic
- **Solution**: Automatic, Reusable, Various Uses

### Why *YOU* NEED This

- You *MUST* need a toolkit for automatic research tasks
- Then you found a right thing
- You discovered a tool for automatic OpenFOAM parameter sweep tool
- Plus graph output
- Plus directory management
- More detail on [chapter 2. 'Key Features'](#2-key-features)
- If you don't need this, then just pass it away -- ***I*** dont want **you** too.

## 2. Key Features

- still on development
